title: Quorum Queues, Raft Replication, Availability, and Data Safety
description: A team declares quorum queues for ephemeral sessions, assumes any replica count survives any failure, omits confirms and manual acknowledgements, and ignores leader locality, majority loss, backlog, and upgrade behavior. Learners cumulatively produce quorum queue safety and availability decision record through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Choose quorum queues for durable replicated data safety and reject them for high-churn temporary queues, lowest latency, or extreme backlogs better served by streams.
Derive tolerated failures and availability from odd replica count, online majority, leader election, placement, and maintenance sequence.
Combine persistent messages, publisher confirms, manual consumer acknowledgements, and duplicate-safe applications for quorum data safety.
